sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102988" key="teletarxiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελετ-αρχικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n102988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pertaining to</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τελετάρχαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διάκοσμος, φύσις</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n102988.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to initiations</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄνομα</foreign>] <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg009:p.33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cra.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.33</biblScope> </bibl> P.</sense> </entryFree>
